allow:
Bash(BASE="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/deedydas/Deedy-Resume/master/OpenFonts/fonts"
DEST="D:/information/circuit_board/nanjing_hosptial/Internship/fonts"

for f in Lato-Hai Lato-Lig Lato-LigIta Lato-Reg Lato-RegIta Lato-Bol; do
  curl -sL "$BASE/lato/$f.ttf" -o "$DEST/lato/$f.ttf" && echo "OK: $f"
done

for f in Raleway-ExtraLight Raleway-Medium; do
  curl -sL "$BASE/raleway/$f.ttf" -o "$DEST/raleway/$f.ttf" && echo "OK: $f"
done)
